description_long: This is a stone tower with a cylindrical structure, featuring a crenellated parapet at the top reminiscent of medieval fortifications. The exterior is adorned with large, sculpted skull motifs embedded into the upper section, giving it a menacing and gothic appearance. The tower has several narrow, arched windows distributed vertically along its facade, and a prominent wooden staircase wraps around the structure, leading to an elevated entrance. The base of the tower is reinforced with stonework and steps, suggesting a fortified foundation. The overall color palette is dominated by gray stone, with brown wooden elements and dark accents. The design evokes a fantasy or dark medieval architectural style, suitable for a dramatic urban or fantasy setting.
description: A cylindrical stone tower with skull decorations, crenellated top, arched windows, and a wooden staircase spiraling to an elevated entrance. The structure has a gothic, fortified appearance with gray stone and brown wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main stone staircase, the entrance at the base, and prominent skull motifs above the doorway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuation of the wooden staircase and additional windows, with the skull motifs visible on the upper section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tower, more windows, and the wooden staircase extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the wooden staircase as it wraps around the tower, with the skull motifs and crenellations clearly visible.
